## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Audit-first behavior is preserved.
- [ ] Cleanup still requires explicit clean mode and confirmation.
- [ ] New cleanup paths are documented and allowlisted.
- [ ] Personal folders and arbitrary large files are not deleted automatically.
- [ ] Reparse points, locked files, and permission-denied files are handled safely.
